info.title: Mio.Generata
info.description: A CLI tool to generate project structure including Areas, Controllers, Views, Models, ViewModels, Interfaces, Services, and basic CRUD 🐼.

options.name: --ajax
options.description: Using create and update in modal with ajax [default: False]

options.name: --enable-old
options.description: Enable compatibility with old source code that doesn't have the MioBaseController module, such as project 'XSchool'. [default: False]

arguments.name: ROOT_PATH
arguments.description: The root path of the project, where the .csproj file is located. If the current path already contains the .csproj file, you can leave this empty.

options.name: --check
options.description: Checking and update latest version [default: False]
